mapper.select: SELECT s.seller_id as "supplierId", s.business_name as "businessName", s.seller_status as "supplierStatus", s.tier as "tier", s.total_products as "totalProducts", s.total_orders_30d as "totalOrders30d", s.gmv_30d as "gmv30d", s.rating as "rating", s.health_score as "healthScore", s.fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", s.return_rate as "returnRate", s.cancellation_rate as "cancellationRate", s.on_time_dispatch_rate as "onTimeDispatchRate", s.avg_response_time_hrs as "avgResponseTimeHrs" FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat s WHERE s.seller_id = #{supplierId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_date::DATE) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE seller_id = #{supplierId} AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND order_date::DATE >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND order_date::DATE <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE)

SELECT o.order_date::DATE as "date", COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) as "orderCount", COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) as "revenue", COALESCE(SUM(o.total_items), 0) as "unitsSold" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND o.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND o.order_date::DATE >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND o.order_date::DATE <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) GROUP BY o.order_date::DATE ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oi.product_id) FROM hm_query.order_items_flat oi JOIN hm_query.order_details_flat o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND o.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND (oi.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR oi.sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT oi.product_id as "productId", oi.product_name as "productName", oi.sku as "sku", COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) as "orderCount", SUM(oi.quantity) as "unitsSold", COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) as "revenue" FROM hm_query.order_items_flat oi JOIN hm_query.order_details_flat o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND o.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND (oi.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR oi.sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) GROUP BY oi.product_id, oi.product_name, oi.sku ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND o.order_status = #{stateId} AND o.order_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND o.order_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND (o.order_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR o.customer_email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT o.order_id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.order_status as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.total_items as "itemCount", o.order_date as "createdTime", o.customer_first_name as "customerFirstName", o.customer_last_name as "customerLastName", o.payment_status as "paymentStatus", o.shipping_status as "shippingStatus", o.tracking_number as "trackingNumber" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND o.order_status = #{stateId} AND o.order_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND o.order_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND (o.order_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR o.customer_email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT p.product_id as "productId", p.product_name as "productName", p.primary_sku as "sku", p.brand as "brand", p.category_name as "categoryName", p.product_status as "productState", p.base_price as "basePrice", p.selling_price as "sellingPrice", p.total_available_qty as "availableQty", p.stock_status as "stockStatus", p.avg_rating as "avgRating", p.review_count as "reviewCount" FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat p WHERE p.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND p.product_status = #{stateId} AND p.stock_status = #{stockStatus} AND (p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.primary_sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT inv.variant_id as "variantId", inv.sku as "sku", inv.product_id as "productId", inv.product_name as "productName", inv.available_qty as "availableQty", inv.reserved_qty as "reservedQty", inv.low_stock_threshold as "lowStockThreshold", inv.stock_status as "stockStatus" FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat inv JOIN hm_query.product_catalog_flat p ON inv.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND inv.stock_status = #{stockStatus} AND (inv.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR inv.sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.settlement_flat st WHERE st.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND st.settlement_status = #{stateId} AND st.period_start >= CAST(#{startDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND st.period_end <= CAST(#{endDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND (st.settlement_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR st.order_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT st.settlement_id as "settlementId", st.order_id as "orderId", st.settlement_status as "settlementState", st.order_amount as "orderAmount", st.commission_amount as "commissionAmount", st.commission_rate as "commissionRate", st.platform_fee as "platformFee", st.net_payout as "netPayout", st.currency as "currency", st.period_start as "periodStart", st.period_end as "periodEnd", st.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.settlement_flat st WHERE st.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND st.settlement_status = #{stateId} AND st.period_start >= CAST(#{startDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND st.period_end <= CAST(#{endDate} AS TIMESTAMP) AND (st.settlement_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR st.order_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT rr.return_id as "returnId", rr.order_id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", rr.product_name as "productName", rr.sku as "sku", rr.reason as "reason", rr.return_type as "returnType", rr.return_status as "returnState", rr.quantity as "quantity", rr.refund_amount as "refundAmount", rr.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.return_detail_flat rr JOIN hm_query.order_details_flat o ON rr.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND rr.return_status = #{stateId} AND (rr.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR rr.reason ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT ff.fulfillment_id as "fulfillmentId", ff.order_id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", ff.fulfillment_status as "fulfillmentState", ff.priority as "priority", ff.fulfillment_type as "fulfillmentType", ff.total_items as "totalItems", ff.carrier as "carrier", ff.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", ff.estimated_ship_date as "estimatedShipDate", ff.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", ff.warehouse_name as "warehouseName", ff.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fulfillment_flat ff JOIN hm_query.order_details_flat o ON ff.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.seller_id = #{supplierId} AND ff.fulfillment_status = #{stateId} AND (ff.tracking_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR ff.fulfillment_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR ff.warehouse_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}
